text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of summer camp. We'll be
starting a more rigorous routine to further
improve performance.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you're doing extra well today, Mr. Sun.
It's getting a bit too bright for a shade chaser like
me, though...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm already wondering if I'll make it out alive.
choice_data_list: You have the Kokura Kinen coming up too.
You have the Kokura Kinen coming up too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Exactly. The summer camp and the race? It's a lot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, Kokura is so far from here, which means less
time for training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Those Umamusume are already so much better
than me, and now I feel like I'll be lagging further
behind.
choice_data_list: Then let's sprint aaall the way to Kokura!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Perfect idea! Free transportation and I'll get
some running in too? Two birds with one stone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's just about 1,000 kilometers, right? That's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
NOT! That'd be insane. Don't even joke about
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nice Nature's blazing hot summer camp
has begun.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um, how about we keep things just slightly hot?
